summary: Frontend chatbot rendering was enhanced with formatting/sanitization and user-friendly fallback messages. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that the backend chatbot logic was updated to produce symptom-based next steps, red flags, specialization+doctor recommendations, or that user input is URL-encoded for the HTTP outcall. The diff also appears to introduce unrequested authentication/identity changes, including edits to an immutable frontend file path and pseudo-identity login behavior.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the backend chatbot behavior to return a non-diagnostic symptom-based response including acknowledgment, safe next steps, red flags, a recommended specialization, a disclaimer, and a robust fallback even if the HTTP outcall fails/returns invalid output.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided backend diff excerpt shows doctor seeding and types, but contains no visible changes to chatbot symptom handling, disclaimer text, red-flag guidance, specialization mapping logic, or explicit fallback behavior when the HTTP outcall fails/returns empty/invalid data.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; shows doctor initialization but no chatbot logic changes visible)

missing_requirements.requirement: Recommend at least one matching doctor name (and specialization) from the seeded directory when the recommended specialization exists; otherwise suggest visiting the Doctors page.
missing_requirements.reason: There is no evidence in the diff summary that the backend chatbot selects doctors from `getAllDoctors()` or matches doctors by specialization for inclusion in chatbot responses.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no evidence of chatbot selecting doctors by specialization)

missing_requirements.requirement: URL-encode the user question before constructing the backend HTTP outcall URL to safely handle spaces/special characters.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence is shown that raw user input is URL-encoded before building the HTTP outcall request URL. The backend excerpt does not show any encoding helper usage or updated URL construction.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced pseudo-identity authentication/session handling instead of relying only on Internet Identity.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states not to add third-party authentication providers and implies Internet Identity remains the supported method. The diff summary indicates a new auth approach using pseudo-principal identities and a changed actor initialization flow to use them, which is not requested and changes authentication behavior.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions: "frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts" pseudo-principal session management; "frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts" uses pseudo-principal identities; "frontend/src/lib/pseudoPrincipal.ts" utility)

hallucinated_features.description: Edited an explicitly immutable frontend file path (`frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`).
hallucinated_features.reason: The Constraints forbid editing `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, but the diff summary states it was modified.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a splash screen and multiple unrelated UI/UX changes (splash timing, revised pages, navigation changes, loading/empty-state logic) beyond the chatbot formatting requirement.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 asks only to ensure the chatbot UI displays multi-paragraph guidance cleanly and provides a helpful fallback. The diff summary lists broad UI changes not requested by the BuildRequest.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (entries for App.tsx splash screen, multiple pages/components changes, BottomNav changes, index.html splash fallback, SplashScreen.tsx)

hallucinated_features.description: Added a backend migration module and wired it into the actor (`backend/migration.mo`, `(with migration = Migration.run)`).
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration-related change was requested in the BuildRequest.
